translation.literal_translation: And because instruction was undertaken after determination of that absence. (37)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.3.37: commencement of upanayana/teaching after establishing non-Shudra status is inferential support for anadhikara thesis.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra compression of the Satyakama evidence.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S03 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit social-category and adhikara terminology choices in records 1.3.089-1.3.096.
